name: GenerateMetaTs
description: Generate TypeScript types from the project's MetaAspectSet (via descriptor).

configStructure.name: fileName
configStructure.description: Blob artifact file name written under --artifacts-out.

configStructure.name: namespace
configStructure.description: Optional export namespace wrapping all generated types. Empty = no namespace.

configStructure.name: seedName
configStructure.description: Label for the generated file header. Empty = use project name.
